description: In this episode of the Delphi podcast, host Pierce interviews Vlad, the founder and CEO of Gunzilla Games. Vlad shares his background in fintech and gaming, detailing his journey from creating a major payment system in Europe to co-founding successful gaming companies, including Plink and the studio behind Warface. He discusses the vision behind Gunzilla Games and their latest project, Off the Grid, a next-generation multiplayer shooter available on multiple platforms. Vlad emphasizes the ongoing development and future plans for the game, currently in Early Access.
topic_summary: Pierce interviews Vlad from Gunzilla Games about his career in fintech and gaming, the founding of Gunzilla, and their new game Off the Grid, highlighting its development and future updates [t=0:96-445:19].
